pricing.title: Clear pricing, confirmed before you commit
points: Silver prices move with the market - we confirm the rate before your order is completed.
Product prices reflect weight, silver type, workmanship and design complexity.
Custom orders always receive a clear written quote before you commit.
pricing.estimateCopy: A rough guide - the final price is confirmed before your order.

reviews.title: What our customers say
reviews.description: Real feedback from people who shopped ready-made and custom silver with us.

items.name: Mariam
items.quote: The bracelet looked even better than the photos. Beautifully packed.

items.name: Omar
items.quote: I requested a custom ring and got a clear quote before confirming. Smooth.

items.name: Salma
items.quote: Order tracking made me feel safe the whole way through.

items.name: Youssef
items.quote: Great quality for the price and quick replies on WhatsApp.

items.name: Nour
items.quote: Delicate and elegant - exactly what I hoped for.

items.name: Hana
items.quote: Arrived faster than expected and the finish is lovely.

items.question: Do you accept custom silver orders?
items.answer: Yes. Upload a reference or describe your idea, and we'll send a clear quote before you confirm.

items.question: Can I track my order?
items.answer: Every order gets a code you can use on the Track Order page with your phone number.

items.question: What payment methods are available?
items.answer: Cash on delivery, Vodafone Cash, InstaPay and bank transfer - with proof upload where needed.

items.question: Does the price include workmanship?
items.answer: Product prices reflect silver weight, type and workmanship. Custom orders receive a detailed quote.

items.question: Can I return or exchange custom orders?
items.answer: Ready-made pieces can be exchanged within 14 days. Custom pieces are made to order, so they're non-refundable unless faulty.
